description: Technical control center of Flowtym hotel management system, providing visibility and management of all external integrations, data synchronization, and API management.

scales.small: text-sm leading-5 text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest

typography.pairing_strategy: The 'Soft Utility' (Dashboard/Apps) + The 'Swiss Brutalist' for technical precision. Manrope provides clean, authoritative headings, while Inter offers maximum legibility for dense tables.

surfaces.glass: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-sm

grids_and_layouts.container: w-full max-w-[1600px] mx-auto p-4 md:p-8 lg:p-12
grids_and_layouts.connector_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8
grids_and_layouts.sidebar_layout: flex flex-col md:flex-row min-h-screen bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-950
grids_and_layouts.spacing_philosophy: Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) for macro-containers to let the data breathe, but tight gap (gap-2, gap-4) for micro-metrics and labels.

charts.instruction: Use Recharts (via Shadcn) for Monitoring Dashboard (line charts for data volume, error rates). Use primary and status colors.

tables.instruction: Use Shadcn Table for Sync History and Unified Data. Apply the 'Grid Borders' micro-theme: subtle borders on right/bottom of cells, hover rows slightly darken.

cards.instruction: Use Shadcn Card for Overview stats and Connectors. Add hover effect: -translate-y-1, border becomes primary color on hover.

badges.instruction: Use Shadcn Badge for source systems (Mews, Booking.com) and statuses. Make them flat, using text-color + bg-opacity-10.

tabs.instruction: Use Shadcn Tabs for navigating Unified Data (Reservations, Guests, Rates). Override height to h-auto.

toast.instruction: Use Sonner for all sync completion, API key generation, and error notifications.

motion.syncing_animation: animate-pulse and a moving linear-gradient border (The 'Tracing Beam' effect) for active syncing connectors.
motion.page_transitions: Fade and slight upward translate (opacity-0 translate-y-4 to opacity-100 translate-y-0) staggered by 100ms for list items.
motion.data_stream: Smooth scrolling for the real-time event stream in the Monitoring view.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against the primary violet (#7c3aed) is pure white (#ffffff) for >4.5:1 contrast. Use darker shades (#0f172a) for body text in light mode.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-live='polite' for the real-time sync status updates and terminal logs.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='connector-sync-button').

media_and_icons.icon_usage: Use Phosphor Icons (Duotone or Regular weight) for all connector types, navigation, and actions. They provide a crisp, technical look perfect for dashboards.

image_urls.description: Abstract purple geometric pattern. Use as a very low-opacity background or hero image for the empty state of the API / Marketplace page.

3d_libraries_and_steps.library: Recharts (2D) for main data, optionally react-fast-marquee for a subtle data-flow ticker in the footer/header.
steps: 2. Setup Shadcn UI components: table, card, badge, tabs, dialog, input, button, sonner.
3. Configure Tailwind theme colors to match Flowtym's Violet and Status colors.
4. Implement the High Density Grid for Monitoring and Tables.
5. Create the 'Terminal' block for real-time logs using JetBrains Mono.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Start by building the top-level layout that integrates with the existing Flowtym TopNavigation.
2. Implement the '/datahub' dashboard overview with Bento Grid layout for KPIs (Total Syncs, Error Rate, Active Connectors).
3. Build the '/datahub/connectors' view using a grid of Neumorphic or Flat cards. Implement the 'Tracing Beam' or a pulsing border for any connector currently syncing.
4. Construct the '/datahub/sync' and '/datahub/data/*' views using Shadcn Tables. Ensure columns for Source System use custom colored Badges.
5. Build the '/datahub/api' page emphasizing security. Use JetBrains Mono for displaying API keys, with 'click to copy' functionality.
6. Build the '/datahub/monitoring' view. This must include Recharts for volume metrics and a black 'Terminal' styled div for real-time event logs.
7. All buttons and interactive elements MUST have a distinct hover state and an active focus ring.
8. Use Phosphor Icons for technical clarity. e.g., <Plugs/>, <Database/>, <ChartLineUp/>.
9. Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, table rows) for testing.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES: Prioritize Data Density: For technical users, scrolling is better than clicking. Show more data per page using dense tables rather than hiding it behind pagination.
Clear Feedback Loops: Every manual sync, configuration change, or API key generation must trigger a clear success/error toast (via Sonner).
Language Context: The user language is French. All placeholder text, labels, and table headers should reflect this ('Connecteurs', 'Synchronisation', 'Données Unifiées').

Status Visibility: Use color intentionally. Only use Red for actual errors, Green for successful connections, Blue for active syncing, and Gray/Neutral for disconnected. Never use these colors for decorative elements.
Avoid the 'Vercel Look': Make the dashboard distinct by using the Flowtym Violet (#7c3aed) subtly in borders, faint glows, and selection states.
